summary: Iteration 144: Mira AI Kit Assembly and Quick Book Testing. Backend APIs pass (10/11 tests). CRITICAL FINDING: The app uses MiraAI.jsx component, NOT MiraChatWidget.jsx where Quick Book form and Add All Items to Cart button were implemented. Backend correctly returns kit_assembly.is_kit=true, kit_assembly.can_add_all_to_cart=true, and show_quick_book_form=true, but frontend MiraAI.jsx doesn't render these features.

minor.issue: Travel kit request returns cake products (Pichkari Cake, Gotta Catch Em' All) due to overly broad regex search matching 'leash' category to unrelated products

ui_bugs.issue: Quick Book form NOT rendered - feature implemented in MiraChatWidget.jsx but app uses MiraAI.jsx
Add All Items to Cart button NOT rendered - feature implemented in MiraChatWidget.jsx but app uses MiraAI.jsx

integration_issues.issue: Backend returns kit_assembly.can_add_all_to_cart=true but MiraAI.jsx doesn't have Add All button
Backend returns show_quick_book_form=true but MiraAI.jsx doesn't render the form

backend_api_tests.test_kit_assembly_response_structure: PASS - All fields present (is_kit, kit_type, items_found, can_add_all_to_cart)
backend_api_tests.test_travel_context_not_cakes: FAIL - Cake products found in travel kit response

mira_chat_widget.add_all_button: NOT PRESENT - feature in wrong component
mira_chat_widget.quick_book_form: NOT PRESENT - feature in wrong component

action_items: CRITICAL: Port Quick Book form from MiraChatWidget.jsx to MiraAI.jsx (lines 1017-1091 in MiraChatWidget.jsx)
CRITICAL: Port Add All Items to Cart button from MiraChatWidget.jsx to MiraAI.jsx (lines 998-1012 in MiraChatWidget.jsx)
MEDIUM: Fix travel kit product search to exclude cake products - improve search query in mira_routes.py extract_product_needs_from_context function
Consider: Either switch App.js to use MiraChatWidget.jsx OR port all features to MiraAI.jsx
critical_code_review_comments: App.js imports and uses MiraAI.jsx (line 105, 374) but Quick Book form and Add All button were implemented in MiraChatWidget.jsx
MiraAI.jsx stores conciergeAction and products in message state but doesn't render Quick Book form or Add All button
Backend mira_routes.py correctly returns show_quick_book_form=true and kit_assembly.can_add_all_to_cart=true
Product search in mira_routes.py uses broad regex that matches unrelated products (cake in travel kit)

success_rate.frontend: 50% (Core features missing due to wrong component)

context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL: App uses MiraAI.jsx component (imported in App.js line 105), NOT MiraChatWidget.jsx. Quick Book form and Add All Items to Cart button were implemented in MiraChatWidget.jsx but need to be ported to MiraAI.jsx. Backend APIs work correctly - returns show_quick_book_form=true and kit_assembly.can_add_all_to_cart=true.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Feature implementation mismatch - Quick Book form and Add All Items to Cart button were implemented in MiraChatWidget.jsx but the application uses MiraAI.jsx component
evidence: MiraChatWidget.jsx lines 1017-1091: Quick Book form implementation
MiraChatWidget.jsx lines 998-1012: Add All Items to Cart button
MiraAI.jsx: No Quick Book form or Add All button code
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Port the Quick Book form and Add All Items to Cart button code from MiraChatWidget.jsx to MiraAI.jsx, or switch App.js to use MiraChatWidget.jsx
